license_strategy: Original pediatric clinical synthesis supported by official government/public-domain-or-copyright-free sources where applicable. No proprietary pediatric manual text copied. Final legal review required before production embeddings.

excluded_sources.title: MedlinePlus / A.D.A.M. Medical Encyclopedia pages
excluded_sources.reason: Known restrictions against automated extraction / AI dataset / RAG embedding use without express written consent.

excluded_sources.title: AAP / HealthyChildren and commercial medical sites
excluded_sources.reason: High-quality clinically, but not ingested into chunks because of licensing/copyright uncertainty for RAG embeddings.

ORIGINAL-PEDS-001.title: Original pediatric clinical-reasoning synthesis
ORIGINAL-PEDS-001.license_notes: Original authored synthesis; not copied from proprietary pediatric manuals. Requires pediatrician review.
ORIGINAL-PEDS-001.used_for: Pediatric question design, risk stratification, red flags, AI safety boundaries.

CDC-MAT-001.title: CDC - Use of Agency Materials
CDC-MAT-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-MAT-001.license_notes: Most CDC/ATSDR information is public domain with attribution and non-endorsement requirements; exceptions exist.

CDC-FLU-001.title: CDC - Signs and Symptoms of Flu
CDC-FLU-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-FLU-001.license_notes: Official .gov source; final legal review required.
CDC-FLU-001.used_for: Pediatric flu symptoms and emergency warning signs.

CDC-RSV-001.license_notes: Official .gov source; final legal review required.
